About the Company

BUILT ON RELIABILITY & RESULTS

Royal Minerals Import Export LLC is a direct-source supplier of premium high-density raw barite, headquartered in Del Rio, Texas. For over five years we have built our reputation on a single principle: say what you’ll do, and do what you say.

Barite is not a commodity where quality can be compromised. It is a critical mineral in oil & gas drilling fluid, controlling wellbore pressure and protecting personnel and equipment. The reliability of your supplier directly impacts your operational safety and bottom line.

We operate direct to buyer — no brokers, no middlemen — delivering competitive pricing, full transparency, and the kind of consistent supply that serious industrial operations depend on.

Direct Source
Mine to buyer with no intermediaries and full material traceability.
Verified Quality
4.30+ SG guaranteed. Every shipment documented and certified.
Timely Delivery
Logistics commitments honored with the same rigor as product specs.
Global Reach
Domestic and international supply with border logistics expertise.
Product Specifications

RAW BARITE — TECHNICAL DATA

Every shipment meets or exceeds API and industry standards for drilling-grade barite. Full documentation and lab reports provided.

4.30+
SG  ·  SPECIFIC GRAVITY
Minimum Guaranteed — Every Shipment

High specific gravity is the defining quality metric for drilling-grade barite. Our material consistently meets and exceeds the 4.30 SG minimum required by API Spec 13A for wellbore pressure control.

MineralBarium Sulfate (BaSO₄)
Specific Gravity4.30+ SG — Minimum Guaranteed
Rock Dimension6 inches or smaller
FormRaw / Run-of-Mine Rock
ColorWhite / Off-White / Light Grey
Primary ApplicationOil & Gas Drilling Mud
Lab Report FrequencyEvery 23 tons per shipment
SamplesAvailable upon request
Supply TypeDomestic & International
OriginDel Rio, Texas, USA
Export ComplianceFull documentation provided
⚗️
Why SG 4.30+
API 13A requires 4.20 SG minimum. Our 4.30+ threshold gives buyers a built-in quality buffer, reducing off-spec risk at the wellsite.
📐
Size Compliance
Rock dimensions ≤6" ensure efficient milling at buyer facilities — reducing processing cost and delivering consistent feed performance.
🔗
No Middlemen
Direct mine-to-buyer supply removes markups and intermediary delays — cleaner pricing and greater accountability per shipment.
📦
Flexible Volume
From trial shipments to long-term supply contracts — we structure agreements to fit your operational requirements and timeline.

Industry Context

WHY BARITE QUALITY IS NON‑NEGOTIABLE

Barite is the primary weighting agent in oil and gas drilling fluids. Low-quality or unreliable supply has direct, severe, and costly consequences for drilling operations.

⚠️
Wellbore Pressure Control
Insufficient SG in drilling mud fails to control bottomhole pressure — risking blowouts, equipment loss, and worker safety incidents.
💰
Downtime Costs Millions
A single day of unplanned rig downtime due to supply failure or off-spec material can cost $500K or more in lost production and logistics.
📊
API Spec 13A Requirements
Industry standard API Spec 13A mandates a minimum of 4.20 SG. Royal Minerals exceeds this with a guaranteed 4.30+ minimum.
🔄
Supply Chain Continuity
Consistent, reliable barite supply enables uninterrupted drilling — protecting project timelines and capital investment.
4.30

Global Supply

IMPORT & EXPORT CAPABILITIES

Our Del Rio, Texas location provides strategic access to U.S.-Mexico border logistics, enabling efficient domestic and international freight routing for buyers worldwide.

🇺🇸
Domestic U.S. Supply
Direct shipments to drilling operations, processors, and distributors across the continental U.S. — competitive direct-source pricing, no broker markup.
🌍
International Export
Full export documentation, compliance, and logistics coordination for international buyers. We manage freight and cross-border paperwork end to end.
🚛
On-Time Logistics
Delivery timelines treated as binding commitments — structured to meet demand schedules and respond quickly to buyer requirements.
📝
Long-Term Agreements
Spot purchases and ongoing supply contracts available. Volume, pricing, and delivery terms structured around your operational needs.
📍
Strategic Location
Del Rio, TX provides direct access to U.S.-Mexico border crossing logistics and major freight corridors for domestic and export shipments.
